creator: lysfjord.daniel@smokepit.net
text:
(In reply to fsbruva from comment #12)

My bad, perfectly working was for my use case (it selected the correct imagemagick based on the unset option X11 for a port that pulled in imagemagick as a dependency) *before* the introduction of USES=magick. If the documentation said otherwise, then that's on me.

Need to go around and post bug reports for the ports where they have a X11 option that chooses imagemagick then.

Closing as working as intended
